title: Cyber Serif Style
description: A high-end 'Cyber Serif' aesthetic blending classical editorial typography with futuristic tech elements. Features a deep #050505 dark mode palette, neon emerald accents (#10b981), glassmorphism, and sophisticated micro-interactions. Suitable for high-end AI SaaS, creative agencies, fintech portfolios, and developer tools. Includes WebGL-inspired background effects, spotlight hover cards, and staggered scroll-reveal animations.
